channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Long Clay Bricks
item.description: Adds a new long variant of the clay bricks.

item.title: Alegacy patches
item.description: targeted patches for the Alegacy server setup

item.title: Alegacy Quest 2
item.description: Quests made for alegacy server

item.title: Alegacy Quest Framework
item.description: Alegacy Quest Framework is a full-featured quest and boss combat engine for Vintage Story.

item.title: Falx To Warhammer
item.description: Turns your trusty Falx into an even trustier Warhammer. Smash your enemies rusty bones!

item.title: Immersive Inventory Slots
item.description: Removes inventory slots, leaving only the crafting grid

item.title: Rock Attac - Armor Protec
item.description: Enables vanilla armor to natively mitigate crushing damage from falling blocks.

item.title: Bear's Shifty Earth
item.description: Overhauls soil instability to make it more engaging, sensible, and configurable.

item.title: C&N Trader
item.description: Custom trader for server

item.title: C&N RPG Classes
item.description: RPG classes for Vintage Story

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic gridless crafting system that completely replaces all UI grid recipes

item.title: Jaunt Speed Patch
item.description: Server-side speed patch for Jaunt mounts.

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: rawNature
item.description: Adds materials, recipes, items, and a new balance of things to the game

item.title: Boat Speed Tweaks
item.description: Multiply all Sailboats speed by the configured factor (default=2.0)

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: RP Voice Chat
item.description: A mod for proximity VoIP. Shout at your friends!

item.title: ChunkLOD
item.description: A Heavily Modified Fork of Farseer, representing terrain, rock type, forestation, and water as LOD's

item.title: Logging Expanded
item.description: An immersive mod that changes the Timber industry in Vintage Story!

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: Still Greenhouses
item.description: Stops wind sway for greenhouse vegetation.

item.title: TerraFirmaStory
item.description: Ports TerraFirmaCraft 1.21 world generation to Vintage Story

item.title: PaintedCanvas
item.description: PaintedCanvas is an in-game pixel-art painting mod for Vintage Story.

item.title: ToE Unconscious 0 Health Respawn Hotfix
item.description: Hotfix for players reviving with 0 health for the Unconscious mod. Made for Thrones of Emberfall.

item.title: Aldi's Classes
item.description: An extremely stable, compatible and customizable classes mod!

item.title: RP Deity Mod
item.description: A religion and RP progression mod for Vintage Story focused on holy sites, blessings, and pilgrimage

item.title: Immersive Body Temperature
item.description: Prepare for summer! Makes hot climates as challenging as cold ones.

item.title: Electrical Progressive: Basics No Gen
item.description: Basic electrical devices... but without the Generators.

item.title: Weaker Oil Lamps
item.description: Makes oil lamps less bright and less white.

item.title: The Remnants Reborn
item.description: Adds a series of custom flavor classes heavily inspired by the Vintage Story lore. 1.22 update.
